mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-order-cancel-sql-oracle.xml - selectInboundHeaderInfo - 입고 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , IBHDKEY , IBSTATUSCD , IBHDTYPECD , RIPRGRSTATUSCD , CUSTORDNO , EXTORDERKEY , ORHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-cancel-sql-oracle.xml - selectInboundDetailInfo - 입고 상세 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , IBHDKEY , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , ICKEY , TRUNC(IBDTKEY::NUMERIC, -2) AS DTKEY , COALESCE(IBQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS QTY /* 수량(반품입고수량) */ , IBQTY AS AVQTY /* 가용(예정)수량 */ , COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS NAVQTY /* 불용수량 */ , IBQTY /* 정상입고수량 */ , DMGQTY /* 파손수량 */ , FOODDMGQTY /* 식품파손수량 */ , DFCQTY /* 불량수량 */ , DONAQTY /* 기부수량 */ , ICADDYN FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}
